allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Form Creator API plugin

Joget DX8 API plugin for creating forms programmatically via REST API.

Features:
- REST API endpoint at /jw/api/formcreator/forms
- Supports JSON and multipart/form-data requests
- Creates forms with database table generation
- Optional API endpoint creation \(createApiEndpoint flag\)
- Optional CRUD interface creation \(createCrud flag\)
- Datalist and Userview generation
- Self-bootstrapping capability

Services:
- FormCreationService: Main orchestrator
- FormDatabaseService: Direct database form registration
- ApiBuilderService: API endpoint creation
- DatalistService: Datalist definition creation
- UserviewService: Userview/menu creation
- CrudService: CRUD interface coordination
- JsonProcessingService: JSON generation and parsing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
